name: lesson
description: Turn any AI-assisted working session into a textbook-quality lesson. Tracks the problem-solving arc via hooks or manual logging, builds a session knowledge graph, and emits a grounded markdown+PDF lesson with diagrams, a quiz, and cross-session learner memory. Works on Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Gemini CLI, GitHub Copilot CLI, OpenCode, OpenClaw, Factory Droid, Trae, and Google Antigravity.
